sideSwapPolicy.halfPolicy: The same six industry-judgment topics are reused after side swap; overtime is out of scope for v1.
sideSwapPolicy.sideRoleResolution: The current defense side must generate defenseProof from the selected topic; the current attack side must generate attackChallenge from the same selected topic.
sideSwapPolicy.teamIdentityRule: Team style and agent specialization must not be interpreted as fixed attack/defense ownership.
hardGuards: Do not hard-code Falcon-7B as permanent attack or VitaLLMty as permanent defense.
Do not bind defenseThesisFocus or attackChallengeFocus to a team slug before resolving current side assignment.
For map rounds 7-12, reuse topics R1-R6 with swapped side roles.

judgeBoundaries: This binding cannot claim a complete China nonferrous fundamental view in phase one.
FRED supports global metal price trend only.
BaoStock supports market reaction and valuation proxy only.
UN Comtrade supports lagged trade trend only.
Missing domestic inventory, SHFE/SMM, and filing page anchors must be surfaced in score caps.
Map overlay contains Dust2-specific team bias, agent specialization, score caps, and referee language guidance.
Team core and agent core must remain cross-industry reusable; Dust2-specific facts belong in map-overlay.json.
Round topics are side-dependent, not team-fixed: current defense consumes defenseThesisFocus, current attack consumes attackChallengeFocus.
After side swap, the same six round topics are reused and the proof/challenge roles must swap with the current side assignment.
